settings.title: Proven by performers, approved by experts

settings.item_text: “I want to give myself the best possible chance to optimize my performance. If I can make myself 1% better, I’ll do it. With BKM’s help, I can enhance my sleep, focus, hormones, and more to become a better athlete. Dreams are free, so dream big!”

settings.item_paragraph: Hockey player, HC Fribourg-Gottéron & Swedish national team
settings.item_text: “To perform at my best on the ice, I feel that Ultra Focus gives me that extra mental edge. Along with BKM Tranquil, I wake up feeling fully rested, getting that optimal deep sleep my body needs.”

“I use all the five products on a daily basis and my favourite is Harmonized since it actually works for women throughout the hormonal cycle. Harmonized has been a game-changer not only for my training and performance, but for my overall life quality.”

settings.item_paragraph: Professional Wrestler · U23 World Championship Bronze Medalist
settings.item_text: Tranquil helps me calm down and land mentally. When it really matters, in training or competition, I use Ultra Focused. I compared it to caffeine and the difference was clear, with Ultra Focused I’m focused and calm, not jittery or stressed. It helps me think clearly and stay mentally flexible.

“For me, it's all about gaining the extra focus and rest between my practice and matches. In Ultra focus and tranquil, you have this opportunity. If you have high goals, you need high quality help as BKM”

settings.item_paragraph: Swedish tennis player with career high #164 ATP doubles
settings.item_text: “BKM Health has become a cornerstone in my daily routines. Ultra Focused keeps me sharp and productive throughout the day, while Tranquil ensures I recover fully and wake up ready to perform at my best.”
”if you are in it to win it, BKM Ultra Focus is the weapon of choice”

settings.text: Are you an athlete and interested in working with us?
